CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255), password VARCHAR(255), last_changed TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, last_changed) VALUES (1, 'test_user', 'old_password', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE users SET password = 'new_password', last_changed = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = 'test_user';
UPDATE users SET password = SUBSTRING(REPLACE('new_secure_password!', '!', ''), 1, 20) WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'test_user');
UPDATE users SET password = CONCAT('hashed_', 'new_password') WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = 1));
UPDATE users SET password = 'pass123' WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'test_user' AND password = 'old_password');
UPDATE users SET password = 'newPassword123!' WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = 'test_user' AND password <> 'old_password');
UPDATE users SET password = (SELECT MAX(password) FROM users WHERE id <> 1) WHERE username = 'test_user';
UPDATE users SET password = 'short' WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(password) < 8 AND username = 'test_user';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE password = 'new_password' AND id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'test_user');
